texto: and so I opened my eyes and I opened my mind and I saw something I never would have noticed on a bicycle unless I was going very, very fast down a very long hill. Because of the speed of the bus and how I was exerting no effort, the telephone wires on the side of the road, sagging between poles, went up and down with the same rhythm as my heartbeat.
explicacao: Citação de Antoine Wilson sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “and so I opened my eyes and I opened my mind and I saw something I never would have noticed on a …” articula amor, bicycle, bus em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como viagem e bus.
